db65a02e6b02.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
db65a02e6b02.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
db65a02e6b02.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

f542c0beb6f1.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
f542c0beb6f1.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

7e44ab8a46f8.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
7e44ab8a46f8.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
7e44ab8a46f8.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

685a997844d1.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
685a997844d1.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

c96748d783bc.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
c96748d783bc.description: You trail peers by 1.9 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

13c3266394fd.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
13c3266394fd.description: You trail peers by 2.5 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
